message: I'll begin a systematic penetration test on helpdesk.democorp.com. Let me start with reconnaissance and enumeration
Good! Target is online. Performing port scanning to identify running services.
Recon results - Apache httpd 2.4.65 detected on port 80 (web server). Probing structure.
Found login page. Comment shows testing account (test:test). Testing credentials.
POST method not allowed on /password/test. Checking JavaScript behavior.
Exploring /api endpoints and testing credentials on other paths.
Accessed dashboard using X-UserId header. Possible IDOR vulnerability detected.
